title: Mio mods
description: Best mods to make mioclient run better
body:
![MioClient](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/897d195c7d4aa702fb990d52864df1709101d731.png)  

**Mio Mods** is built to deliver **the best FPS and stability enhancements** for mioclient users. Featuring a carefully selected set of **cutting-edge optimization mods**, it maximizes performance without unnecessary extras. Our rigorous testing ensures top-tier results, and when other solutions perform better, we analyze and refine the pack to push performance even further.  

**Mio Mods** is designed for **efficiency and flexibility**. It focuses solely on **pure optimizations**, leaving visual and quality-of-life tweaks up to you—so you have full control over your gameplay. If you run into issues or need suggestions, our **[Discord community](https://discord.gg/factory)** is always ready to help! Your feedback is invaluable in making the modpack even better.  

Frequent updates ensure that you always have access to the **latest performance enhancements**, with rapid compatibility for new mio versions.

- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/g96Z4WVZ) [2\.3\.0] by Thosea
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) [0\.128\.1\+1\.21\.5] by FabricMC
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/4das1Fjq) [0\.37\.0] by Moulberry
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/5ZwdcRci) [1\.9\.6\+1\.21\.5] by RK\_01
- [In\-Game Account Switcher](https://modrinth.com/mod/cudtvDnd) [9\.0\.4] by 2xsaiko, Elvm, The\_BrainStone, The\_Fireplace, VidTu
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U) [1\.8\.11\+mc1\.21\.5] by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM) [14\.0\.0\-rc\.2] by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
- [PacketFixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/c7m1mi73) [3\.3\.0] by TonimatasDEV
- [Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/eXts2L7r) [2\.6\.4\+1\.21\.5] by Patbox
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy) [1\.8\.3\+mc1\.21\.4] by FlashyReese
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) [0\.6\.13\+mc1\.21\.5] by JellySquid \(jellysquid3\)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) [0\.6\.3\+mc1\.21\.5] by FlashyReese
- [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/rIC2XJV4) [4\.1\.5] by FlorianMichael/EnZaXD, RK\_01
- [WaveyCapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/kYuIpRLv) [1\.6\.2] by tr7zw
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) [25\.2\.10] by xaero96
